name: SAP PLM (Product Lifecycle Management) API
what_it_does: SAP PLM REST APIs for product lifecycle management across engineering, manufacturing, and recipe management scenarios. Enables AI agents to manage engineering change order (ECO) workflow and approval tracking for product development lifecycle, handle bill of materials (BOM) hierarchy retrieval and change management for product structure analytics, access document management (DMS) data for engineering drawing and specification retrieval, retrieve recipe and formula management data for process manufacturing product lifecycle, manage product compliance and regulatory data for REACH, RoHS, and product safety obligations, handle classification and characteristics data for product catalog intelligence, access variant configuration and product model data for configure-to-order manufacturing, retrieve product development project data for R&D portfolio management, manage inspection plans and quality control data linked to product lifecycle, and integrate product lifecycle data with SAP ECC/S4HANA, CAD systems, and manufacturing execution platforms.
use_cases: Tracking engineering changes from product development agents
Retrieving BOM structures from manufacturing analytics agents
Managing product compliance from regulatory reporting agents
Accessing recipe data from process manufacturing agents
not_for: Discrete manufacturing without complex BOM and engineering change workflows
Simple document management without product structure integration
Non-SAP environments without SAP PLM integration context
best_when: A manufacturer, pharmaceutical company, or process industry using SAP PLM wants AI agents to automate engineering change management, BOM retrieval, product compliance tracking, recipe management, and R&D project analytics integrated with SAP S/4HANA.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: SAP PLM manages regulated product compliance data (REACH, RoHS, FDA drug product records) — automated product compliance status changes without regulatory affairs review creates compliance exposure. Engineering change order automation in aerospace and defense (AS9100) requires documented change authorization. Recipe management automation in pharmaceutical manufacturing (GMP, 21 CFR Part 211) requires validated change control.

auth.notes: SAP PLM APIs use OAuth 2.0 (SAP BTP XSUAA). APIs available via SAP Business Technology Platform and SAP API Business Hub. BTP destination services for SAP S/4HANA on-premise connectivity. SAP API Business Hub has sandbox environment for testing. Walldorf, Germany (SAP SE HQ). SAP PLM spans: DMS (document management), ENG (engineering), Recipe Management, and Product Compliance. Well-documented via SAP API Business Hub.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — SAP license required; sandbox access via API Business Hub
pricing.paid_tiers: Part of SAP S/4HANA and SAP PLM license; separate BTP consumption pricing
pricing.notes: Walldorf, Germany. SAP SE (SAP NYSE). PLM capabilities within SAP S/4HANA and standalone SAP PLM packages. SAP Recipe Management for process industries. SAP EHS for product compliance. SAP Innovation and Portfolio Management for R&D. Deep integration with SAP MM, PP, QM, and SD modules. Market leader in enterprise software with strong PLM capabilities for SAP shops.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key and BTP service plan

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: SAP PLM Recipe Management in pharmaceutical manufacturing has 21 CFR Part 211 GMP change control requirements; automated recipe modifications without validated change control process creates FDA regulatory exposure
SAP BTP connectivity complexity — SAP PLM API access via BTP requires destination service configuration for S/4HANA on-premise; network and trust configuration adds complexity vs. pure cloud APIs
SAP module dependency — PLM data is distributed across SAP MM (materials), PP (production), QM (quality), and SD modules; full product lifecycle queries may span multiple SAP modules
Engineering change order (ECO) authorization — ECO approval workflows have SAP organizational level controls; automated ECO creation must route to correct change board configuration
BOM explosion complexity — multi-level BOM explosion with phantom assemblies and co-products requires careful SAP BOM category handling; validate BOM type (production, sales, engineering) in queries
Product compliance regulatory data — REACH/RoHS substance declarations in SAP EHS are regulatory compliance records; automated compliance status updates require regulatory affairs review
agent_readiness.security_notes: SAP PLM and product lifecycle. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FedRAMP. OAuth2/XSUAA. US/EU/on-premise. Product engineering and compliance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SAP PLM. SOC2, GDPR, FedRAMP. OAuth2/XSUAA. US/EU. Product lifecycle and compliance data.
